name: Xentral
description: ERP SaaS for SMB e-commerce with REST API for inventory, orders, shipping.

seo.title: Xentral — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Xentral: ERP SaaS for SMB e-commerce with REST API for inventory, orders, shipping.

when_to_use: ERP REST API for inventory sync in e-commerce operations
Order management API integration for Shopify and Amazon
Shipping automation via Xentral API connectors
SMB e-commerce ERP with open API for custom tooling
Multi-channel order routing via Xentral integrations

pros: REST API for orders and inventory
cons: API rate limits hit on sync
review.verdict: Practical ERP for German e-commerce SMBs, but the product assumptions don't travel well outside DACH.
review.best_for: DACH e-commerce SMBs unifying orders and inventory
review.not_for: US e-commerce brands or non-European ERP needs
